commit.message:
Redesign Daily Challenge section with animated DC card and streak tracker

Daily Challenge Card:
- Animated gold shimmer border sweeping left-to-right (CSS keyframe)
- Gold radial glow behind card title
- ★ DAILY CHALLENGE gold badge + 2× POINTS orange badge header
- Movie title in Bebas Neue, italic quote, actor + difficulty badge
- Live HH:MM:SS countdown "New challenge in" to UTC midnight
- "Open Scene →" gold button wired to openModal()
- Green completion overlay animates in after daily submit or on page load
  when profile shows daily_done_today=true

Streak Card (right of DC card on desktop, stacked on mobile):
- 🔥 fire emoji with CSS flicker animation (scale + skewX + brightness)
- Large orange streak number in Bebas Neue
- 7-day dot row: each column shows day abbreviation + dot state
    empty = not completed, ✔ done (orange), ★ today (pulsing orange ring)
- Milestone message adapts to streak count and whether today is done

Layout: CSS grid 1fr/240px on desktop, single column on mobile

JS:
- renderDailyCard(), renderStreakCard(), streakMessage(), showDailyComplete()
- loadStreakCard() fetches /api/profile on boot/login/register
- showPointsEarned() calls showDailyComplete()+renderStreakCard() on daily submit
- startDailyCountdown() reloads both daily + streak at midnight

commit.message:
Add Daily Challenge feature with streak tracking

Backend:
- get_daily_scene_id(): MD5 hash of UTC date string → deterministic scene for all users
- GET /api/daily: returns scene, date, bonus_multiplier, secs_until_reset
- DB migration: users.streak INTEGER, users.last_daily TEXT
- POST /api/submit: detects daily scene, awards 2× points, updates streak
  (streak increments if last_daily = yesterday, resets to 1 otherwise)
  returns is_daily, daily_bonus, daily_already_done, streak
- GET /api/leaderboard: includes streak per user row
- GET /api/profile: includes streak, daily_done_today, daily_scene_id

Frontend:
- Daily bar above scene grid: scene name + live HH:MM:SS countdown to UTC midnight
- Countdown auto-reloads daily data when it hits 00:00:00
- Gold "DAILY CHALLENGE" badge on the matching scene card
- "★ Daily · 2× pts" pill in recording modal header
- Points panel shows daily bonus amount + 🔥 N-day streak on completion
- Leaderboard: 🔥N streak badge next to username
- My Progress: streak shown in division card

commit.message:
Robustness improvements: unwrap removal, DB error surfacing, binary search (#118)

* Replace .unwrap() on JSON mutations with bracket notation (closes #117)

All 13 `params.as_object_mut().unwrap().insert(...)` sites in client.rs
now use `params[key] = value`, eliminating panic risk on malformed JSON
values. This matches the existing pattern used elsewhere in the file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Surface critical DB errors in status bar (closes #112)

Add `db_warn_visible()` method that logs errors AND displays them in the
status bar, so users can see when database operations fail instead of
failures being silently swallowed. Converted critical operations
(message insert/edit/delete, reactions, pins, polls, expiration timer,
accept/reject, send timestamp/status) while keeping the lightweight
`db_warn()` for non-critical ops (read markers, mute/block toggles,
contact/group list loops).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Replace O(n) message lookups with binary search (closes #111)

Add Conversation::find_msg_idx() using partition_point for O(log n)
timestamp lookups. Replace ~14 linear scans (.iter_mut().rev().find())
in app.rs with the binary search helper. For compound conditions
(timestamp + sender), binary search narrows to the timestamp then
checks sender on the single match.

In db.rs, replace O(n*k) reaction attachment loop in load_conversations
with a HashMap<i64, Vec<usize>> for O(1) timestamp→index lookup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Fix Bronze notebook timezone: set session TZ to UTC

snapshot_ts strings written by pollers are naive UTC, but Spark was
parsing them as Phoenix local time (UTC-7), causing ingest_ts to appear
7 hours ahead. Adding spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
to notebooks 20 and 21 matches the Gold layer convention.

ingest_ts is audit metadata only — no data correctness impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(memory): add immorterm_id pipeline for stable terminal identity

immorterm_id (the VS Code windowId) is a stable identifier that survives
context compaction, unlike session_id which rotates. This commit threads
immorterm_id through all save paths and enables filtering by it.

Changes:
- MCP server: add immorterm_id to SQLite schema migrations (5 tables),
  search_memory/search_recent_memories filtering, add_memories metadata
  enrichment, and explain_change tool
- Worker: fix 4 code paths where SQLite received raw metadata instead of
  full_metadata (with injected immorterm_id + session_id)
- Save buffer: re-raise Redis connection errors instead of swallowing them,
  enabling the inline fallback path in memories.py (was dead code before)
- Hooks: pass immorterm_id through digest, digest-save, and digest-daemon
- Hook installer: sync generated hooks with standalone hook changes

Verified: 53/53 E2E tests pass (Celery path, inline fallback, Qdrant
filtering, edge cases).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(quick-9): scrape financeMonthlyPayment and financeTermMonths from SunPitch

- Add sub-route interceptor (**/api/proposals/{uuid}/**) to capture any
  finance sub-API endpoint that SunPitch fires at page load time
- Add DOM scrape (page.evaluate + innerText) after polling loop settles;
  extracts payment via /\$[\d,]+\/mo/i and term via /MONTHS 1-N/i patterns
- Prefer API-intercepted finance values over DOM-scraped values
- Update parseApiResponse() to accept optional domMonthlyPayment and
  domTermMonths params; sets fields when found, pushes to missingFields
  when not (graceful degradation)
- Remove hardcoded always-missing block for financeMonthlyPayment/Terms
- All log entries include [scraper] prefix for Vercel log filtering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(logs): per-session directories for AI terminals + prevent premature archival

AI daemon sessions were writing structured logs (grid.jsonl, cast, ai.jsonl)
as flat prefixed files in the root logs directory instead of per-session
subdirectories. Two bugs were responsible:

1. daemon.rs fell back to the root log dir when IMMORTERM_WINDOW_ID was empty
   instead of using the session name as a directory suffix.

2. cleanup.ts used getAllTerminalsFromRegistry() to build the active window ID
   set, but that function filters out session_type='ai' (for restoration
   purposes). This caused AI session directories to be immediately archived
   as "orphans" — sometimes within 1 second of creation.

Changes:
- registry-client.ts: Add getAllActiveWindowIds() that includes AI sessions
- cleanup.ts: Use getAllActiveWindowIds() for liveness checks + add archive
  indexing to immorterm-memory
- daemon.rs/registry.rs: Always create per-session dir (fallback to session
  name when window_id is empty), add session_status/shelved_at fields
- logger.rs: Deduplicate prompt snapshot events arriving in same PTY read
- registry-client.ts: Write coalescing (100ms) to reduce disk I/O from
  rapid stat updates, session shelving support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(compliance): institutional positioning and legal compliance across all surfaces

Add explicit legal backing under four pillars (Tecnologicamente robusto,
Metodologicamente defensável, Juridicamente responsável, Publicamente auditável)
across web app, README, wiki and docs.

Web app:
- New /compliance page: headline, 4-pillar cards, full legal basis table
  with links to planalto.gov.br, what-we-dont-do section, compliance plan
- Implement SiteFooter (was return null): 4-column footer with Base Legal,
  Auditabilidade, Transparência columns + disclaimer bottom bar; rendered
  on every page via layout.tsx
- Home page: add "Posicionamento Institucional" strip between hero and nav
  with 4-pillar cards and prominent /compliance link
- Methodology: expand Base Legal table with direct planalto.gov.br links,
  add "Conformidade da Metodologia" section with 4 pillars and CTA

Docs:
- New docs/COMPLIANCE.md: full technical-legal document (8 sections:
  legal status, constitutional foundations, LAI, LGPD, compliance plan,
  what we dont do, contestation, editorial responsibility)
- New docs/wiki/Legal-Compliance.md: accessible wiki page with 4-pillar
  table, law references, quick FAQ and platform comparison
- docs/wiki/FAQ.md: +5 legal compliance Q&As (legality, LGPD, liability,
  who can use, how to contest)
- README.md: Compliance section with LAI/LGPD/AGPL-3.0 badges and 4-pillar
  table linking to docs/COMPLIANCE.md

All legal citations reference specific articles (no vague references).
Content accessible to citizens; technically precise for auditors/lawyers.

feat(governance): domain guard, veracity scoring, compliance automation & public /sources

- Add shared/connectors/domain_guard.py: government TLD whitelist (.gov.br,
  .leg.br, .jus.br, .mil.br, .mp.br, .def.br) enforced at HTTP layer;
  DomainException for controlled non-government sources; DomainNotAllowedError

- Add shared/connectors/veracity.py: SourceVeracityProfile (5-criterion
  weighted model: domain 40%, legal authority 25%, availability 15%, API docs
  10%, metadata 10%); SOURCE_VERACITY_REGISTRY for all 29 connector:job pairs

- Rewrite CEAPS fetch (senado.py): remove Codante dependency, use official
  Senado API legis.senado.leg.br/dadosabertos/senador/{id}/ceaps; per-senator
  cursor s{idx}y{idx}; XML/JSON dual-format support

- Integrate domain guard into http_client.py (_guarded_client helper); remove
  senado_ceaps_client(); add validate_domain call to querido_diario.py

- Add veracity columns to CoverageRegistry ORM + Alembic migration 0013
  (nullable ADD COLUMN — zero-downtime safe)

- Add worker/tasks/compliance_tasks.py: weekly check_source_compliance Celery
  task (Monday 06:00 UTC) — domain validation, exception expiry alerts, HTTP
  HEAD probes, coverage_registry status update

- Add @explanatory_only decorator (shared/ai/provider.py): asserts LLM
  functions return str, raises TypeError otherwise, logs every invocation;
  applied to explain_signal()

- Add GET /public/sources endpoint: full transparency on data provenance,
  veracity scores, domain whitelist and controlled exceptions

- Add docs/GOVERNANCE.md: source classification policy, veracity methodology,
  LLM usage policy, compliance automation, reproducibility guarantees

- Add guardrails to CLAUDE.md: domain guard mandatory, new sources need
  veracity profile + GOVERNANCE.md update, LLM must use @explanatory_only

- Add 43 new tests across domain_guard, veracity, public_sources,
  compliance_tasks, llm_guardrails; update Senado and scheduler tests

commit.message:
Classify AEAT errors and add smart retry logic for VeriFactu submissions

Permanent errors (invalid data, duplicates, schema) no longer trigger
useless retries. Transient errors (connection, HTTP 5xx) retry with
backoff up to configurable max. VeriFactu Monitor UI shows classification
badges and retry progress.

commit.message:
Fix build-time crashes from top-level SDK initialization

Resend and Anthropic clients were instantiated at module scope,
causing next build to fail when env vars are not available.
Changed to lazy initialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: コード品質向上・セキュリティ脆弱性の修正

【🔴 重大な問題の修正】
- config.py: 本番環境でデフォルトシークレットキーの使用を禁止（起動時チェック）
- main.py: CORS設定を過度に許容的から制限的に変更（allow_methods/allow_headers明示化）
- data.py: パストラバーサル防止を強化（os.path.realpath()による正規化）
- books.py: register_external_book APIをPydanticスキーマで型安全化（ExternalBookRegister）
- dependencies.py: JWT claims検証を強化（sub claimの存在チェック・UUID形式検証）

【🟡 改善すべき問題の修正】
- books.py/admin.py: 検索クエリにmax_lengthを追加（DoS対策）
- frontend/lib: STATUS_LABELSを共通定数として抽出（DRY原則）
- authStore.ts: ローカルUser型を削除し型を統一（型安全性向上）
- auth関連ファイル: 全ての`as any`キャストを排除（型安全性改善）

【修正内容の詳細】
- 9ファイル修正、1ファイル新規作成
- セキュリティリスク（JWT偽造、パストラバーサル、未検証入力）を排除
- 型安全性を大幅向上（as anyの完全排除、型定義の統一）
- 保守性向上（DRY違反解消、定数の集約化）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
